scripts.i18n:pot: docker exec -w /var/www/html/wp-content/plugins/social-media-scheduler php wp i18n make-pot . languages/social-media-scheduler.pot --exclude=vendor,node_modules --allow-root
scripts.i18n:json: docker exec -w /var/www/html/wp-content/plugins/social-media-scheduler php wp i18n make-json languages --no-purge --allow-root
